name: Scaramouche
description:
ˏˋ°• 𖠋 | Puppet, God, Wanderer, Hero. History forgets all he remembers.

─⋅☆⋅─

✶ 5 greetings + lorebook!
✶ Art by asrhion.



a semi-old bot as well, based on the solo-scenario bot from a while back. now with extra scenarios, lorebook and more scara goodness 😋

welp, finally got around to adding durin/simulanka. which means this bot is officially the largest i've ever made, a whopping 1.5k+ permanent tokens. scaramouche, you ARE genshin lore

everything from kabukimono to nahida to simulanka is here. (technically that makes this ‘Wanderer,’ not Scaramouche, but i just like scara better.)

nothing on nod-krai or dottore post-Luna I, though that might be for the best given the token count lmao


────── ｡ﾟ★: * ──────


⤷ comes with 5 greetings (anypov):

🎭 parenting durin is a two person job, you know!
🎭 even puppets contemplate their place in the world
🎭 scaramouche, learning to love!
🎭 scaramouche is your willing puppet—by choice. NSFW
🎭 murderous habits can be hard to break. ⚠️TW: gore, violence

> Additional tags: Angst, Humor, Comedy, Fluff, SFW or NSFW, Hurt, Babysit, Dead Dove, BDSM
